Fractal Explorer

Choose how you want to start. You can use live microphone input for audio reactivity, or continue without it.

Keyboard Help

  • Space = toggle UI panels
  • J = rewind
  • K = play/pause
  • L = fast forward
  • W / A / S / D = move camera
  • Q / E = move camera up/down
  • Mouse drag = rotate fractal
  • Pinch = zoom on touch devices
